816 X0570B_CRCTN_OSA_TYPE_IND X0570B_CRCTN_OSA_TYPE_IND X0570B Correction OSA Type Code CHAR 1 This item contains the reasons for assessment from the prior erroneous Optional State Assessment record. 1 = Start of therapy assessment
2 = End of therapy assessment
3 = Both: Start and End of therapy assessment
4 = Change of therapy assessment
5 = Other payment assessment discontinued
